title: Internal Mail Tracking DLQ Dashboard
description: Starter Kibana saved object payload for monitoring malformed Kafka Connect records in real time.

attributes.title: Internal Mail Tracking Dead-Letter Overview
attributes.description: Operational dashboard for malformed records routed through Kafka Connect dead-letter handling.
